
  Introducing GPT-5.5

  GPT-5.5 is now available in Codex. It's our strongest agentic coding model yet, built to reason through large
  codebases, check assumptions with tools, and keep going until the work is done.

  Learn more: https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-5/

  You can always keep using GPT-5.4 if you prefer.

  Choose how you'd like Codex to proceed.

› 1. Try new model
  2. Use existing model

  Use ↑/↓ to move, press enter to confirm
